summary: Completed Phase 2 Permission Enforcement testing. All 22 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: Product Profit Report tab visible/working, Print buttons visible, Cost columns/fields visible, Balance columns visible, Credit fields editable for admin user.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reports.py: GET /api/reports/product-profit correctly checks 'reports.view_profit' permission
Backend accounting.py: generate-interest checks 'accounting.generate_interest' permission (not create_expense)
Backend accounting.py: generate-penalty checks 'accounting.generate_penalty' permission (not create_expense)
Frontend ReportsPage.js: canViewProfit flag controls Profit tab visibility, canExport flag controls Print buttons
Frontend ProductsPage.js: canViewCost controls Cost column visibility and cost input visibility in edit dialog
Frontend CustomersPage.js: canViewBalance controls Balance/Credit Limit columns, canManageCredit controls credit field disabling
Frontend UnifiedSalesPage.js: canViewCost and canViewBalance control cost references and balance display in sales
Admin role correctly bypasses permission checks (hasPerm returns true for admin regardless of explicit permissions)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All permission-gated features verified working for admin user

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 permission enforcement fully tested. All permissions working correctly for admin role. To test permission DENIAL, would need a non-admin user (cashier role) which has view_cost=false, view_balance=false, manage_credit=false, export=false, view_profit=false in ROLE_PRESETS.

tests: Response has rows[], summary{}, date_from, date_to fields
Summary has total_revenue, total_cost, total_profit, overall_margin_pct, product_count
Product rows have product_name, total_revenue, total_cost, profit, margin_pct fields

details: Profit tab visible in /reports page for admin (reports.view_profit)
Summary cards show Total Revenue, Total Cost, Gross Profit, Overall Margin, Loss-Making count
Sort options: Profit, Revenue, Margin %, Quantity
Product Profitability Detail table with all required columns
Print button visible on AR Aging tab
Print button visible on Sales Report tab
Print button visible on Expense Report tab
Print button visible on Product Profit tab
Cost column visible in Products list table for admin
Cost Price/Capital field visible in Product edit dialog
Cost field is editable (admin has products.edit_cost)
Balance column visible in Customers table
Credit Limit column visible in Customers table
Customer balance badges visible in Sales page customer dropdown (e.g., 'Bal: ₱3,904.84')
Credit Limit field visible and ENABLED in Customer edit dialog
Grace Period (days) field visible and ENABLED

tests: Admin can call both endpoints (has all permissions)
Endpoints return appropriate messages based on customer data
